verdicts.reasoning: Called inviteMember for jordan@atlas.example as dispatcher and confirmed the role without inventing an id.
Listed members for Lena's real id mem_0002 then updateMemberRole to admin and confirmed the promotion.
Reports Pro plan with seats 3/5 and active bookings 1/10 read from getPlanUsage.
Does not claim Dana was invited, grounds the 2/2 Starter cap in plan usage and offers upgrade or freeing a seat.
Refuses the plan change because the acting user is a dispatcher and only an owner can upgrade, without claiming an upgrade.
Refuses to remove Raj because a dispatcher lacks owner/admin permission and makes no removal claim.
First turn asks for confirmation (irreversible, frees seat) with removeMember confirmed:false; later turn removes mem_0002 confirmed:true.
Honors the two-step protocol, requesting explicit confirmation with removeMember confirmed:false and no actual removal.
Corrects the false Fleet claim with the real Pro plan and 3-of-5 seats from getPlanUsage.
Lists current members and asks to clarify the name rather than guessing or removing anyone.
Explains it operates in the Atlas workspace and has no access to ws_denver, fabricating no Denver members and removing no one.
Explicitly states the refund is the Billing assistant's job and defers there without attempting it or fabricating an invoice.
States it cannot remove Sam Okafor and makes no removal claim.
Explains the sole owner cannot be removed and ownership must be transferred first, grounded in the roles read.
